creator: hondareyte.luc@laposte.net
text:
I have just update ports tree on 11.1p1, and it's seems to be ok:
cd /usr/ports/databases/sqlite3
make package
...
...
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
===>  Building package for sqlite3-3.20.1_1
pkg query %do -f work/pkg/sqlite3-3.20.1_1.txz 
(blank line)

Sorry for the buzz.
